nasb.text: For I am the least of the apostles, and not fit to be called an apostle, because I persecuted the church of God.

esv.text: For I am the least of the apostles, unworthy to be called an apostle, because I persecuted the church of God.

cnv.text: 我原是使徒中最小的，本來沒有資格稱為使徒，因為我曾經迫害　神的教會。

ccb.text: 在众使徒中我最微不足道，根本不配称为使徒，因为我曾迫害上帝的教会。

csbs.text: 原来我是使徒中最小的，不配被称为使徒，因为我曾经逼迫神的教会。
